title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies family as a Instructional Designer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
